message:
fix(vdbe): propagate column-level COLLATE NOCASE to WHERE comparisons, add conformance tests

Column-level collation (e.g. TEXT COLLATE NOCASE) now flows from table
schema into VDBE comparison opcodes for WHERE clause equality and
inequality filters.  Explicit COLLATE on the expression still takes
priority.  Also adds test_conformance_multi_level_aggregates,
test_conformance_alter_table, and test_conformance_collation oracle tests.
Fixes known-gap annotations for -0.0 display and SUM float precision.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
